81664449.title: 2025–26 UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup
81664449.extract:
The 2025–26 UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup was the 33rd edition of UCI Cyclo-cross World Cup. It is a season-long cyclo-cross competition, organized by the Union Cycliste Internationale (UCI) and Flanders Classics, that took place between 23 November 2025 (2025-11-23) and 25 January 2026 (2026-01-25). 
The defending champions in the Elite category were Michael Vanthourenhout in the men's competition and Lucinda Brand in the women's competition.
